title: [lichen_link_rx.c:153] Typo: -EAUTH instead of -LICHEN_EAUTH
description:
Flow: verify_mic() -> CRC32 fallback path -> return -EAUTH

In lichen_link_rx.c line 153, the code returns `-EAUTH` when CRC32 MIC is received but CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_INSECURE_CRC32_MIC is not enabled.

`-EAUTH` is not a standard POSIX errno and may not be defined. On some platforms this will be a compiler error; on others it may compile to an undefined value.

The correct constant is `-LICHEN_EAUTH` (defined in lichen/errno.h as 200).

This is in a compile-time conditional path (only reached when CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_INSECURE_CRC32_MIC is NOT enabled), but the typo should still be fixed for consistency.
close_reason: Fixed: Changed -EAUTH to -LICHEN_EAUTH at line 153 in lichen_link_rx.c
